response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile, experienced generalist with nearly two decades of full-stack work and genuine scale exposure (millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic), but the role is a Principal IC6 specializing in experimentation and growth systems. The resume shows no experimentation platform, A/B testing, feature-flagging, telemetry, or metrics-infrastructure experience, and no evidence of leading multi-team, multi-workstream initiatives at the scope this level demands. His recent AI-agent and MCP tooling work aligns with the AI-first emphasis, but the core domain gap is too large for a principal-level hire in this specialty.
strengths: 15+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and backend systems
Real high-scale, low-latency production experience (micro-services handling millions of HTTP requests/second)
Recent hands-on AI tooling work (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks) plus open-source leadership and mentoring
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or telemetry/metrics platform experience — the core of this role
No demonstrated principal-level scope: career is senior/staff IC roles at small-to-mid companies without multi-team initiative ownership
No evidence of statistical analysis or data-science collaboration required for experiment quality and bias detection
